site_tagline: Find a time that works for everyone — no account needed.
page_create_title: Create availability poll — Who Has Time?
home_intro: Create an availability grid and share the link. Participants paint when they're free — like When2meet, without an account.
home_date_mode_range_hint: Every day between start and end is available
home_date_mode_pick_hint: You choose exactly which days count
home_time_mode_times_hint: 15, 30, or 60 min blocks in a daily window
home_time_mode_whole_day_hint: Yes or no per day — no clock times
home_date_mode_range: Date range — participants choose from all days in the range
home_date_mode_pick: Pick specific dates — you choose which days are available
home_time_mode_times: Time range with slots (15, 30, or 60 min)
home_pick_dates_hint: Set the calendar window, then click days to include or exclude them.
home_pick_dates_invalid_range: Set a valid start and end date to pick days.
home_show_names_on_heatmap: Show participant names on the heatmap
home_show_names_on_heatmap_hint: When enabled, participants can see who selected each slot or day — not just how many. Off by default.
howto_1: Create a poll — choose a date range or pick specific dates, with or without time slots.
howto_2: Share the participant link — only people with the link can access it.
howto_3: Everyone marks their free days or time slots on the grid.
howto_4: The heatmap shows when the most people overlap.
poll_howto_1: Enter your name so others know who you are.
poll_howto_2: Tap or drag across the grid to mark when you're free.
poll_howto_3: Save your availability — bookmark your personal edit link to update it later.
poll_howto_4: Switch to the heatmap tab to see when the most people overlap.
admin_closed_notice: This poll is closed — no new responses accepted.
admin_participant_link_hint: Keep this link private — it is the only access control.
admin_admin_link_hint: Bookmark this page to manage the poll.
admin_send_links_hint: Send the participant and admin links to your inbox.
admin_no_responses: No responses yet. Share the participant link to get started.
admin_grid_locked: Grid settings are locked because responses already exist. You can still edit title, description, and heatmap visibility.
poll_closed_view_hint: You can still view the group heatmap.
grid_edit_link_hint: Bookmark or copy this link to change your availability later.
grid_no_responses_heatmap: No responses yet — the heatmap will appear once people submit availability.
error_title_too_long: Title must be at most 200 characters.
error_dates_required: Start and end dates are required.
error_end_before_start: End date must be on or after start date.
error_times_required: Valid start and end times are required.
error_end_time_before_start: End time must be after start time.
error_slot_minutes: Slot duration must be 15, 30, or 60 minutes.
error_grid_locked: Cannot change dates, times, or slot size after responses exist. Create a new poll instead.
error_rate_limit: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
error_name_too_long: Name must be at most 100 characters.
error_email_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
error_email_send_failed: Could not send the email. Please try again later.
email_edit_link_intro: here is your personal link to update your availability for "{title}":
email_edit_link_footer: Save this link to update your availability anytime.
email_poll_links_intro: Here are the links for your poll "{title}":
email_poll_links_admin_hint: Your admin link — keep this private
email_poll_links_footer: Keep these links private — they are the only access control.
error_picked_date_out_of_range: All picked dates must fall within the calendar window.
